primary_redshift_frame: zHD for Pantheon+ and DES; release z for Union3.1

gates.cross_probe_transfer: SN shape held fixed; SN-visible variables are not retuned, while any SN-invisible BAO variable may be fitted once; DESI p >= 0.05
gates.boundary: no active parameter at registered bound
gates.physical_identification: all statistical gates plus action-level derivation

exploratory_followup: A rank-two common-ruler plus radial-slip control may be run only after all registered rank-one candidates fail; it is labelled post hoc and cannot promote.
claim_boundary: locates observable closure deficiency; does not identify a fundamental field
